title: angelonia serrata
intro: Angelonia serrata, also known as Sabdariffa or hibiscus sabdariffa, is a tropical plant native to Asia and Africa, belonging to the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, its flowers, calyces, and leaves are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angelonia serrata include reducing high blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from fever and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
